title: frankenia hirsuta subsp. intermedia
intro: Frankenia hirsuta subsp. intermedia, commonly known as bushy saltbush or intermediate frankenia, is a shrub-like plant that belongs to the family Frankeniaceae. It is native to Australia and has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating skin conditions, wounds, and infections due to its antibacterial and antifungal properties. The plant has been found to have various health benefits, including reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and exhibiting antioxidant activity. Frankenia hirsuta subsp. intermedia can be prepared into herbal remedies such as teas, infusions, and ointments, which are used topically to treat skin conditions and wounds.
